08月05日.zh_des: 使用可组合的FSDP和PEFT方法微调Meta Llama3的脚本，以涵盖单节点/多节点GPU。支持摘要和问答等应用程序的默认和自定义数据集，支持多种坦率的推理解决方案，如用于本地或云部署的HF TGI、VLLM。演示应用程序以展示用于WhatsApp和Messenger的Meta Llama3。
08月05日.name: meta-llama /llama-recipes
08月05日.description: Scripts for fine-tuning Meta Llama3 with composable FSDP & PEFT methods to cover single/multi-node GPUs. Supports default & custom datasets for applications such as summarization and Q&A. Supporting a number of candid inference solutions such as HF TGI, VLLM for local or cloud deployment. Demo apps to showcase Meta Llama3 for WhatsApp & Messenger.
